title: Project Downloads
text:
CS101::Spring 2026
Use this page to download project files, starter code, and tutorial materials.
The page is organized by project folder. To add a new project later, place its files in a new folder inside materials/files/, render the site again, and Quarto will publish both the page and the downloadable files.
